area: Midtown Raleigh / North Hills District, NC
schema_note: This file extends buildings.json with the rest of the scene: roads, intersections (incl. traffic lights), parks, and shops. All features share the SAME local_xz coordinate system as buildings.json (district centroid at 35.8390, -78.6420 = local (0,0), units in meters, +x east-ish, +z north-ish). Load both files and place everything in one scene using local_xz directly.

roads.name: Six Forks Road
roads.notes: Main north-south spine through the district. Slight eastward curve as it goes north -- don't make it a perfectly straight line.

roads.name: Lassiter Mill Road
roads.notes: Roughly east-west, crosses Six Forks Rd near the retail core.

roads.name: Park at North Hills Street
roads.notes: Local access road curving past the office tower district, feeds into Six Forks Rd.

roads.name: St Albans Drive
roads.notes: Local connector through the innovation district, feeds into Lassiter Mill Rd.

roads.name: Midtown Internal Loop (generic walkable lane)
roads.notes: Closed loop -- represents the walkable retail core internal streets (lower speed, wider sidewalks, on-street parking). Use a different road material/width than the arterials.

intersections.notes: Major intersection -- main signal-controlled crossing in the district.
Signal at the office tower district entrance.
Minor junction into the retail core loop -- stop sign rather than a signal, matches the lower-speed pedestrian character there.

parks.name: North Hills Central Plaza/Green
parks.notes: Sits at the heart of the walkable retail core, surrounded by the shop cluster. Good spot for a focal/decorative element in the scene.

shops.name: Retail Block A (generic storefronts)
shops.notes: Row of 4-6 small attached shopfronts facing the internal loop road.

shops.name: Retail Block B (generic storefronts)
shops.notes: Single-story strip facing the plaza, slightly angled to the loop road.

shops.name: Anchor Retail/Department Store Block
shops.notes: Larger single retail volume (department-store scale) bordering the green plaza.

shops.name: Restaurant Row
shops.notes: Ground-floor restaurants with small outdoor patio areas facing the loop road -- consider adding small umbrella/patio props here.
